nasb.text: He sent messengers throughout Manasseh, and they also were called together to follow him; and he sent messengers to Asher, Zebulun, and Naphtali, and they came up to meet them.

esv.text: And he sent messengers throughout all Manasseh, and they too were called out to follow him. And he sent messengers to Asher, Zebulun, and Naphtali, and they went up to meet them.

cnv.text: 他派使者到瑪拿西全地去，瑪拿西人也都應召來跟從他；他又派使者到亞設、西布倫、拿弗他利去，他們也都上來與他們會合。

ccb.text: 他派人走遍玛拿西、亚设、西布伦和拿弗他利各支派召集军队，得到了人们的响应。
